strategies.name: MA Support Retest
strategies.activation_reason: Approved V1 live strategy for daily Korean-stock evaluation.
strategies.summary: Rising moving-average support retest after a constructive uptrend.
strategies.when_to_use: Use after price pulls back into a rising moving-average support area without breaking the larger daily structure.
strategies.when_not_to_use: Avoid when price is below the support average, trend structure is flat-to-down, or the latest daily bars are stale or partial.
strategies.holding_profile: Swing trade measured in days to a few weeks while the daily trend remains intact.
strategies.disclaimer: Educational strategy card only. Zone and rule outputs guide planning but do not guarantee future performance.

strategies.name: Resistance Breakout Retest
strategies.activation_reason: Approved V1 live strategy for daily Korean-stock evaluation.
strategies.summary: Breakout above a prior daily resistance area followed by a controlled retest.
strategies.when_to_use: Use when price clears a visible daily resistance zone and then holds it on a later pullback with acceptable volume behavior.
strategies.when_not_to_use: Avoid when the move is extended from the breakout area, volume confirmation is weak, or the benchmark backdrop is clearly deteriorating.
strategies.holding_profile: Momentum-oriented swing plan that expects follow-through within the next several daily bars.
strategies.disclaimer: Educational strategy card only. Zone and rule outputs guide planning but do not guarantee future performance.

strategies.name: Pullback
strategies.activation_reason: Approved V1 live strategy for daily Korean-stock evaluation.
strategies.summary: Trend-following pullback into a constructive daily demand area.
strategies.when_to_use: Use when a stock is already in a healthy daily uptrend and retraces into an area where prior buyers have defended price.
strategies.when_not_to_use: Avoid when the pullback is actually a trend break, the market regime is hostile, or data freshness is not reliable.
strategies.holding_profile: Swing trade that expects the broader daily uptrend to resume after the pullback stabilizes.
strategies.disclaimer: Educational strategy card only. Zone and rule outputs guide planning but do not guarantee future performance.

strategies.name: Darvas/Range Breakout
strategies.activation_reason: Approved V1 live strategy for daily Korean-stock evaluation.
strategies.summary: Daily box consolidation followed by a breakout above range resistance.
strategies.when_to_use: Use when price has built a stable daily range and then breaks above the top of that structure with supportive volume context.
strategies.when_not_to_use: Avoid when the range is noisy, the breakout happens on weak confirmation, or data coverage is partial.
strategies.holding_profile: Breakout swing plan that seeks continued expansion after the range resolves higher.
strategies.disclaimer: Educational strategy card only. Zone and rule outputs guide planning but do not guarantee future performance.

strategies.name: MA Reclaim
strategies.activation_reason: Approved V1 live strategy for daily Korean-stock evaluation.
strategies.summary: Price regains a meaningful moving average after trading below it.
strategies.when_to_use: Use when a stock reclaims a key daily moving average and then starts to hold above it instead of falling back under immediately.
strategies.when_not_to_use: Avoid when reclaim strength is weak, the move is countertrend, or the benchmark regime remains clearly unsupportive.
strategies.holding_profile: Recovery-oriented swing plan that waits for reclaimed daily structure to prove itself.
strategies.disclaimer: Educational strategy card only. Zone and rule outputs guide planning but do not guarantee future performance.

strategies.name: Value/Quality
strategies.activation_reason: Fundamentals are not available in the Slice 1A foundation, so the card stays educational only.
strategies.summary: Fundamental quality and valuation discipline paired with patient daily entry planning.
strategies.when_to_use: Use as an educational framework when you want to combine balance-sheet quality, earnings durability, and disciplined entry zones.
strategies.when_not_to_use: Do not treat this as live logic until fundamentals are actually available and validated in the product.
strategies.holding_profile: Longer holding horizon than the technical trigger cards once fundamentals can support the thesis.
strategies.disclaimer: Educational strategy card only. It is not currently evaluable in V1.

strategies.name: PEAD
strategies.activation_reason: PEAD is explicitly out of V1 live scope.
strategies.summary: Post-earnings drift continuation after a meaningful earnings surprise.
strategies.when_to_use: Use only after a future slice adds reliable earnings-event inputs and post-event rules.
strategies.when_not_to_use: Do not use in Slice 1A because earnings surprise and event timing are not part of the foundation.
strategies.holding_profile: Event-driven swing or position trade once the required earnings dataset exists.
strategies.disclaimer: Deferred strategy definition only. No live PEAD evaluation is implemented in V1.

strategies.name: Sector Rotation
strategies.activation_reason: Sector ranking and breadth inputs are deferred beyond Slice 1A.
strategies.summary: Rotate toward sectors showing improving leadership versus the market.
strategies.when_to_use: Use only after sector-level comparative data and ranking rules are available.
strategies.when_not_to_use: Do not use in Slice 1A because the foundation does not provide sector ranking data.
strategies.holding_profile: Relative-strength style swing or position framework once sector leadership data exists.
strategies.disclaimer: Deferred strategy definition only. No sector rotation logic is implemented in V1.

strategies.name: VCP
strategies.activation_reason: Pattern-specific contraction logic is deferred beyond Slice 1A.
strategies.summary: Volatility contraction pattern that resolves into a constructive breakout.
strategies.when_to_use: Use only after future slices add the pattern-detection rules and supporting validations.
strategies.when_not_to_use: Do not use in Slice 1A because VCP-specific evaluator logic is intentionally deferred.
strategies.holding_profile: Breakout swing framework that depends on repeated contraction and expansion behavior.
strategies.disclaimer: Deferred strategy definition only. No live VCP evaluation is implemented in V1.

strategies.name: Gap-and-Go
strategies.activation_reason: Intraday-sensitive gap behavior is outside the daily-bar Slice 1A foundation.
strategies.summary: Strong gap continuation setup that typically depends on more granular execution context.
strategies.when_to_use: Use only after a future slice intentionally supports the needed gap rules and execution constraints.
strategies.when_not_to_use: Do not use in Slice 1A because daily-bar-only data is insufficient for dependable gap-and-go logic.
strategies.holding_profile: Tactical momentum setup that needs more than the current daily-only foundation.
strategies.disclaimer: Deferred strategy definition only. No live Gap-and-Go evaluation is implemented in V1.

strategies.name: RSI Oversold Rebound
strategies.activation_reason: Indicator-driven rebound logic is deferred beyond Slice 1A.
strategies.summary: Mean-reversion rebound after an oversold momentum reading.
strategies.when_to_use: Use only after future slices intentionally add RSI-based evaluation logic and guardrails.
strategies.when_not_to_use: Do not use in Slice 1A because RSI-specific evaluator logic is intentionally deferred.
strategies.holding_profile: Shorter-term rebound framework that requires disciplined exit handling once implemented.
strategies.disclaimer: Deferred strategy definition only. No live RSI rebound evaluation is implemented in V1.

strategies.name: BB Squeeze
strategies.activation_reason: Bollinger-width compression logic is deferred beyond Slice 1A.
strategies.summary: Volatility compression followed by a directional expansion from a Bollinger squeeze.
strategies.when_to_use: Use only after future slices add Bollinger-width calculations and expansion rules.
strategies.when_not_to_use: Do not use in Slice 1A because squeeze-specific evaluator logic is intentionally deferred.
strategies.holding_profile: Expansion-style swing framework that depends on indicator-based compression and release.
strategies.disclaimer: Deferred strategy definition only. No live BB Squeeze evaluation is implemented in V1.

strategies.name: Relative Strength Leader
strategies.activation_reason: Cross-sectional relative-strength inputs are not available in the Slice 1A foundation.
strategies.summary: Focus on stocks outperforming the market and peers over a persistent daily window.
strategies.when_to_use: Use only after future slices add reliable cross-sectional ranking and benchmark-relative calculations.
strategies.when_not_to_use: Do not use in Slice 1A because the required relative-strength dataset is not available yet.
strategies.holding_profile: Leadership-following swing framework that depends on repeatable cross-sectional measurements.
strategies.disclaimer: Blocked-by-data strategy definition only. No live evaluation is available until the required data exists.
